description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a minimalist, modern design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight, square legs. The wood grain is visible across the entire surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The table has a medium-dark brown finish, with no visible hardware, drawers, or decorative elements. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for use as a dining, work, or utility table in urban environments. The construction appears sturdy, with legs positioned at each corner for stability. The overall look is clean and functional, making it versatile for various settings.
description: A rectangular, medium-dark brown wooden table with a smooth surface and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the table's length and the visible wood grain running along the tabletop, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the tabletop and all four legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the table's length and wood grain with two legs visible.
